title: Already insured objection handled then prospect open
description: Prospect says they are already insured. Dana handles objection without arguing and prospect decides to review options.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Hi, this is Alex with American Beneficiary. I was checking if you're still open to looking at final expense options.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: I understand. Many people we help have coverage, but they like to check if they can get more benefits or save money. Are you open to seeing if we can help you too?

turns.speaker: prospect
turns.text: Yes, I guess I could look at it.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Great. Just to make sure we have the right options, how old are you?
